artifact_refs.description: Manual official-only notebook used to author the Restaurant Revenue TC1 human baseline.
Run-level metadata for the canonical Restaurant Revenue human baseline.
Maps each predicted bank action to the supporting notebook section.
Author notes for the Restaurant Revenue human baseline.

notes: True bank-id authoring for tc1_from_scratch using an official-only repo-local notebook. The baseline selects a conservative OpenDays-centered primary spine plus the explicitly implemented model-specific branches for an Istanbul indicator, standard scaling over the P-features, and a log1p target transform.
